message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam packageBorderThickness 3
skinparam packageBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
skinparam classBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classBorderThickness 1
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
skinparam noteBorderColor #333333
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1

package "class Flyweight(享元模式)" as P {

  class FlyweightFactory {
    -mMap:HashMap
    --
    +getFlyweight()
  }

  class Flyweight {
    --
    +dosomething()
  }

  class ConcreteFlyweight {
    -intrinsicState:String
    --
    +dosomething()
  }

  note right of FlyweightFactory
    享元工厂
  end note

  note right of Flyweight
    享元对象抽象基类或者接口
  end note

  note right of ConcreteFlyweight
    具体的享元对象
  end note

  FlyweightFactory *-- Flyweight
  ConcreteFlyweight --|> Flyweight
}

@enduml
